name: Temporal Bridle
descs:
Turn Start: units with a Blunt Attack Skill(except E.G.O Skills) gain 1 [AttackUp].

Units with 2+ Blunt Attack Skills gain 1 [AttackUp] and 1 [HitDamageUp] instead.

Units with 2+ Blunt Attack Skills that use Minus Coins gain 2 [AttackUp] and 2 [HitDamageUp] instead.

Turn Start: Units with Blunt Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> [AttackUp] at Turn Start.

Units with 2+ Blunt Attack Skills gain <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> [AttackUp] and 1 [HitDamageUp] instead.

Units with 2+ Blunt Attack Skills that use Minus Coins gain <style="upgradeHighlight">3</style> [AttackUp] and 2 [HitDamageUp] instead.

Turn Start: Units with Blunt Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) gain 2 [AttackUp] and <style="upgradeHighlight">1 [HitDamageUp]</style> at Turn Start.

Units with 2+ Blunt Attack Skills gain 2 [AttackUp] and <style="upgradeHighlight">2</style> [HitDamageUp] instead.

Units with 2+ Blunt Attack Skills that use Minus Coins gain 3 [AttackUp] and <style="upgradeHighlight">3</style> [HitDamageUp] instead.
